name: layered-graphics-monorepo
description: Headless graphics authoring for applications, scripts, browsers, and agents.

scripts.check: cargo check --workspace && pnpm --filter @layered-graphics/core build && pnpm --filter @layered-graphics/browser build && pnpm -r check
scripts.site:build: pnpm --filter @layered-graphics/core build && pnpm --filter @layered-graphics/browser build && pnpm --filter @layered-graphics/site build
